name: Issei Hyoudou
description: The main protagonist of the series, a perverted high school student who is reincarnated as a Devil by Rias Gremory. He possesses the Sacred Gear Boosted Gear, housing the Welsh Dragon Ddraig.

name: Rias Gremory
description: The primary heroine of the series, an heiress of the noble Gremory Clan and the President of Kuoh Academy's Occult Research Club. She inherits the Power of Destruction from her mother's side.

name: Akeno Himejima
description: The Vice-President of the Occult Research Club and Rias's Queen. She is a sadist in combat who wields holy lightning magic inherited from her Fallen Angel father, Baraqiel.

name: Koneko Toujou
description: A first-year student at Kuoh Academy and Rias's Rook. She possesses immense physical strength and senjutsu abilities despite her diminutive stature.

name: Yuuto Kiba
description: A handsome and popular male student who serves as Rias's Knight. He is a survivor of the Holy Sword Project and utilizes the Sword Birth Sacred Gear.

name: Asia Argento
description: A former Christian nun who was excommunicated due to her rare healing Sacred Gear, Twilight Healing. She is saved by Issei and reincarnated as Rias's Bishop.

name: Xenovia Quarta
description: A holy sword wielder sent by the Vatican to retrieve stolen Excaliburs. After discovering God's death, she defects and joins Rias's peerage as a Knight.

name: Irina Shidou
description: Issei's childhood friend and a devout Christian warrior. She is eventually reincarnated into an Angel as Michael's Ace, while remaining close to the Occult Research Club.

name: Gasper Vladi
description: A cross-dressing half-vampire who serves as Rias's second Bishop. He possesses the Forbidden Balor View Sacred Gear, which allows him to freeze the time of anyone he looks at.

name: Rossweisse
description: A former Valkyrie bodyguard of Odin who was left behind in Japan. Rias recruits her into her peerage as a Rook, and she subsequently takes a job teaching at Kuoh Academy.

name: Sirzechs Lucifer
description: Rias's older brother and one of the Current Four Kings of the Underworld holding the title of Lucifer. He possesses unparalleled destructive magical power.

name: Grayfia Lucifuge
description: The wife and Queen of Sirzechs Lucifer, serving as the ultimate authority among the maids of the Gremory household. She belongs to the noble Lucifuge family.

name: Serafall Leviathan
description: Sona Sitri's eccentric older sister who holds the title of Leviathan among the Four Satans. She is obsessed with magical girl personas but possesses formidable ice-based magic.

name: Sona Sitri
description: The student council president of Kuoh Academy and heiress to the Sitri Clan. She is Rias's childhood friend and a strategic genius specializing in water magic.

name: Tsubaki Shinra
description: The Vice-President of the Student Council and Sona's Queen. She wields the Sacred Gear Mirror Alice, which reflects damage back at attackers.

name: Azazel
description: The leader of the Fallen Angels who is obsessed with researching Sacred Gears. He later acts as an advisor to the Occult Research Club after negotiating peace between the Three Factions.

name: Vali Lucifer
description: The direct descendant of the original Lucifer and Issei's fated rival. He is the possessor of the Divine Dividing Sacred Gear, housing the Vanishing Dragon Albion.

name: Michael
description: The leader of Heaven and the Archangels following the death of God in the Great War. He seeks global peace among the factions to preserve the safety of humanity.

name: Kuroka
description: Koneko's older sister and an SS-Class stray Devil who assassinated her master. She later joins Vali's team and possesses exceptional masteries over senjutsu and youjutsu.

name: Bikou
description: The current Monkey King and a direct descendant of Sun Wukong. He joins Vali's faction in search of excitement and conflict.

name: Arthur Pendragon
description: A descendant of King Arthur who wields the Holy King Sword Collbrande. He leaves the British royal family to align himself with Vali's team.

name: Le Fay Pendragon
description: Arthur's younger sister and a descendant of Morgan le Fay. She is a highly talented magician specializing in Norse magic and pacts with familiars.

name: Ophis
description: The Infinite Dragon God and initial figurehead leader of the Khaos Brigade. She seeks to reclaim her home, the Dimensional Gap, from Great Red.

name: Great Red
occupation: Dragon Who Fly in the Dimensional Gap
description: An incredibly massive dragon that resides within the Dimensional Gap, representing illusions and dreams.

name: Riser Phenex
description: The third son of the Phenex Clan who was initially engaged to Rias Gremory via arranged marriage. He possesses the trait of immortality characteristic of the Phoenix.

name: Ravel Phenex
description: Riser Phenex's younger sister who formerly served as his Bishop. Following his defeat, she develops feelings for Issei and eventually transfers to Kuoh Academy.

name: Cao Cao
description: A charismatic human leader claiming descent from the historical Cao Cao. He wields the True Longinus, the strongest of all Sacred Gears.

name: Saji Genshirou
description: Sona's loyal Pawn and the Student Council's Secretary. He hosts the Sacred Gear Absorption Line, which contains a piece of the Black Dragon Vritra.

name: Odipus Rayon
description: A rogue Stray Devil hunted down and killed by the Occult Research Club during Issei's first successful contract mission.

name: Kokabiel
description: A warmongering Fallen Angel leader who orchestrates a plot to instigate a new conflict among the Three Factions by attacking Kuoh Academy.

name: Baraqiel
description: A high-ranking Fallen Angel cadre member and the estranged biological father of Akeno Himejima.

name: Raynare
description: The primary antagonist of the first arc who adopts the alias Yuuma Amano to assassinate Issei and claim Asia Argento's Sacred Gear.

name: Ddraig
description: One of the Heavenly Dragons who fought during the Great War. He was sealed inside the Boosted Gear and serves as Issei's inner mentor.

name: Albion
description: The second Heavenly Dragon who was sealed inside the Divine Dividing Sacred Gear, serving as Vali Lucifer's partner.

name: Milos
description: A loyal Knight serving Riser Phenex who participated in the Rating Game against Rias Gremory's peerage.
